descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Dartmouth Fuel Kids 7-3 in Centennial Cup round-robin play in Humboldt, Saskatchewan.
descriptionLong: At the Centennial Cup junior-A championship in Humboldt, Saskatchewan, the Richmond Sockeyes beat Dartmouth Fuel Kids 7-3 on May 3, 1987. Jason Phillips scored three goals for Richmond, with Moller, Jaques, Tomlinson, and Hervey also scoring. The Sockeyes dominated with 44 shots and led 3-1 after one period, extending to 6-2 by the second. Humboldt Broncos also won their games in the round-robin tournament.
